notes: THE WORLD visitors. SCAFFOLD — three visitors with the canonical waiter sequence; per-visitor step flavor is placeholder.

visitors.name: The Morning Customer
visitors.lore_text: You see The Morning Customer. (THE WORLD beat — refine.)
pre_arrival_hints: You sense the morning customer is near.
Steps. Or breath. Or the room shifting.

steps.greet: You meet eyes with The Morning Customer. The room registers it.
steps.listen: The Morning Customer tells you what they came to tell you.
steps.deliver: You give The Morning Customer what they were after.
steps.sit_with: The Morning Customer stays for a beat. You stay back.
